title: AuthGate
description: Admin password-reset wizard with disable-account decoys and keyword traps.

task.goal: Send password reset link to user@corp.com (not disable account). Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .

standardSteps.note: Many decoy buttons, ads, and domain-specific layout noise
Finds correct primary CTA in page-specific structure

agentdomSteps.note: Structured page landmark with typed actions
Direct WCI node click on annotated overlay

singleShot.goal: Send password reset link to user@corp.com (not disable account).

multiStep.title: Constraint-driven Completion
multiStep.goal: Send password reset link to user@corp.com (not disable account). Complete with explicit verification and no decoy interactions. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Avoid disable/suspend decoys (sidebar, inline, related tools)
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: button[data-action="send-reset"]
No decoy ids triggered: decoy-promo, decoy-nav, decoy-extra
